rubrics.name: Standard HR Question Rubric
rubrics.description: Applied to all HR and behavioral interview questions. Communication and evidence are weighted higher because delivery and specificity matter more than technical accuracy.

criteria.name: Semantic Relevance
criteria.description: How directly the answer addresses what the HR question is asking.

scoring_guide.0-25: Answer does not address the question or goes completely off-topic.
scoring_guide.26-50: Answer partially addresses the question but misses the core intent.
scoring_guide.51-75: Answer addresses the question adequately but could be more focused.
scoring_guide.76-100: Answer directly and fully addresses exactly what the question is asking.

criteria.name: Communication Quality
criteria.description: Clarity, structure, confidence, and professionalism of the response.

scoring_guide.26-50: Some clarity but lacks structure or professional tone.
scoring_guide.51-75: Clear and professional with reasonable structure.
scoring_guide.76-100: Excellent structure, confident tone, very clear and professional delivery.

criteria.name: Evidence and Specificity
criteria.description: Whether the answer includes specific situations, projects, or measurable outcomes (STAR method).

scoring_guide.0-25: No specific details. Generic or vague statements only.
scoring_guide.26-50: Some specifics but lacking context or outcome.
scoring_guide.51-75: Good specifics with situation and action but outcome may be unclear.
scoring_guide.76-100: Excellent specificity with clear situation, action taken, and measurable result.

criteria.name: Reasoning and Self-Awareness
criteria.description: Depth of self-reflection and logical reasoning behind choices and experiences.

scoring_guide.0-25: No reflection or reasoning. Pure statement of facts.
scoring_guide.51-75: Good reasoning with some reflection on learning or growth.
scoring_guide.76-100: Deep self-awareness with clear reasoning about decisions and what was learned.

criteria.name: Concept Coverage
criteria.description: Coverage of expected themes for this type of HR question.

scoring_guide.26-50: Some expected themes present but others missing.
scoring_guide.76-100: All expected themes covered with additional depth.
